text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Almost there... Just one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature... She seems to be overexerting herself of
late.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Her last race must be bothering her. Hmmm... In
that case...

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio vs. Nice Nature! It's time for a pop
quiz!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like we've got quite the audience. Ooh, fantastic! This is going to be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Uhhh, Ikuno? How come you're giving us a quiz?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You're only going to end up getting hurt if you
keep pushing yourself so hard.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: So I thought that perhaps if you went up against Teio off the track, you might finally brighten up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Really now? Geez... You're letting your
imagination run away with ya.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started already, Nature! Better brace
yourself though! Or else the Invincible Teio will
best you in this quiz too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Teio, you seriously like this stuff?! I swear, you're
game for just about anything!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Fine! It's not like you two are giving me much of a say in this anyhow!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time for the first question. What is the
name of the traditional Japanese underwear that
covers the waist to the ankles?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Momohiki!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
That's correct! Nice Nature takes the lead!
Question number two...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Don't count your carrots before the harvest!"
And the next answer—that type of ancient grave
is called a Zenpokoenfun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding! Ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow, you're on a roll, Nature! I need to catch up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature aces the beginning of the quiz. But
soon enough...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ooh, I know that series! It's On Our Fair Wings!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's on fire with a streak of five
consecutive correct answers!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh, how do you like that?! Now that's what you call a comeback!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What?! Seriously?! How'd she close the gap so
fast?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She's practically glowing with confidence. Well,
that figures...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everything was perfect! I had the win in the bag!
But that darn Teio just had to...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Dang it, dang it, dang it! I can't believe this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, wake up Nature! If I give up now, I'm just
going to end up frustrated again!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This isn't over yet! The answer is sankin-kotai! The
Japanese pit viper! A rakugo performer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio versus Nice Nature—their fierce
competition is neck and neck up to the very last
question. But in the end, the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! The winner, by just a one-point
margin, is... Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I beat Teio. I... won!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, sooo close! This is sooo frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...But you won't be so lucky next time, Nature!
This isn't over!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What the?! Now she's acting like the main
character on her redemption arc?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Geez. Her optimism's unwavering.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. In any case, Nature, you finally got your
win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ikuno... Yeah, I did.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still... I know I won today, but the frustration's
still there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So I'm not going to rest—not until I beat Teio in a
race!
